== Notes for [[Item:Q91261|Q91261]] ==

ID: I82395

Name:

Surname: of Judea

Sex: F

_UID: 4D02728FB1557A46A728C3129446B1F53A4F

Change Date: 6 Oct 2005

Death: deceased

Father: Absalom of Judea

Marriage 1 Aristobalbus II Maccabeus of Judea

Children

Alexander Hasmonean Maccabeus

Forrás / Source:

http://wc.rootsweb.ancestry.com/cgi-bin/igm.cgi?op=GET&db=jdp-fam&id=I82395

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
